title: Create: SomeTricks
description: Mod adds additional blocks and create-based recepies for some items and tricks for better gaming experience.
body:
## This is an add-on for the Create mod, that adds new Blocks, create-based recipies for some items and some tricks for improving your gaming experience.
There are new recipies for 10 items for now:
- Enchanted golden apple
- Totem of undying
- Elytra
- Shulker shell
- Glowstone dust
- Redstone
- Netherite scrap
- Pointed dripstone
- Spawner (yes it is :D)
- Calcite

![10 items with new recipies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4a6f59c32d1cc1ec1374f7d6a9afb2f1ad4a802.png)

This mod fully compatible with JEI, so you can check these recepies there.

## NEW BLOCKS

There's a **spruce log generator** (AKA compact tree farm) with a fair recipie (imho) for the convenience of placement. You can take items from it with a funnel or other similar stuff.

**Trader depot** - it acts like a villager that give emeralds for sticks but can automated. Also there's a tier system for it. Use up to 3 Cured apples to lower the needed amount of sticks for 1 emerald (1 apple - 28/32, 2nd - 20/32, 3rd - 16/32 sticks per emerald). NEED TO KNOW THAT to craft a cured apple you need a golden apple and a weakness potion dozed on it.

![Trade depot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be37f6a90b2461d85474d083b3c25133f68dcbb0.png)

Also I added my own painting just for fun (try to find it) and a music disc "C418 - Aria math" (all credits to C418). Disc can be purchased from a wandering trader with some chance or a master-level librarian. 

## NEW ITEM

**Doom Shield**. (just for fun, kinda :)
(JUST LIKE IN THE DOOM: THE DARK AGES) While you're holding the shield ONLY in your left hand, you can press V (customisable) to launch it. If it hits the entity, causes a lighting strike on it and deals 5 damage (cooldown around 1.5 sec). Also, if you are blocking with it, the attacker will be damaged on 2 hp if it hits you and forcely knocked back. It uses FORGE ENERGY (FE) and can be charged in charger (new block).

## NEW STRUCTURE

Lost factory: custom structure, seems like ancient ruins of mad scientist that contains some mystery behind. Also there's a loot chest with interesting stuff. (rarely you can find Aria math music disc. And there's a chance to get Cured Apple only at night!). Spawns more likely near water (but I'm not sure)

### RUSSIAN LOCALIZATION is now available!.

### Important
I've been made this mod according to myself and my experience, so some recipies may look unfair in some ways. So if you guys have any suggestions about updating an existing recipie, or you want me to add another one, hare this to my discord server. I would appreciate it! And yeah, this is my first mod ever :)

### Another Important thing
Create: Enchantment industry required only for Enchanted golden apple recipie. Also it is tested on the version of this mod below 2.0.0, so I have no clue if it will still work on new versions (above 2.0.0), but I suppose it will!

Of course there will be future updates, more recipies, tricks, and so on. So stay tuned)
